allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Servidor ainda não respondeu: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173" -TimeoutSec 4 -UseBasicParsing; "OK $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Offline — reiniciando..."; Start-Process -FilePath "cmd.exe" -ArgumentList "/c cd /d C:\\Users\\Hudson\\BlackDog\\tempodeaprender-page && npm run dev" -WindowStyle Normal })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; "Servidor OK - Status $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Ainda iniciando..." })

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); Start-Process -FilePath "cmd.exe" -ArgumentList "/c gh auth login" -WindowStyle Normal)

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); Set-Location "C:\\Users\\Hudson\\BlackDog\\tempodeaprender-page"; gh repo create tempodeaprender-page --public --description "Site institucional da Escola Tempo de Aprender — Escada/PE" --source . --remote origin --push 2>&1)
